title: Upon His Sister-In-Law, Mistress Elizabeth Herrick
content:
First, for effusions due unto the dead,
My solemn vows have here accomplished;
Next, how I love thee, that my grief must tell,
Wherein thou liv'st for ever. Dear, farewell!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon His Sister-In-Law, Mistress Elizabeth Herrick", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
